prestazioni: HR15DE (1.5L I4) engine swap to HR16DE (1.6L I4) with JWT Stage 2 camshafts (264° duration, 10.5mm lift) and Tomei 4-2-1 header (1.75" primaries) for optimized scavenging and mid-range torque gain (target: 140whp on 98 RON fuel).

Garrett GT2560R turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with custom 3" stainless downpipe (HKS Hi-Power 40mm wastegate) and GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller (14.5 psi peak, mapped via Nistune Type 3 ECU with HR16DE-specific ROM).
Custom 3-core front-mount intercooler (Setrab 4000 series, 22" x 6" x 3.5" core) with Mishimoto silicone couplers and HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve (prevents compressor surge during gear shifts).
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion (front fenders extended 2.5", rear 3.5") with custom carbon fiber overfenders (Seibon CFRP, 2x2 twill weave) and relocated rear bumper reinforcement (Nismo Cube-specific).
Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (16x8 +35 offset, 5x114.3 PCD) with Toyo R888R tires (205/45/16) and custom hub-centric spacers (5mm front, 10mm rear) for aggressive flush fitment.
Custom rear diffuser (Rocket Bunny-inspired, 3D-printed ABS with carbon fiber weave overlay) and Cusco rear strut tower bar (HR16DE-specific, 22mm diameter) to reduce chassis flex under load.
